title: poa royleana
intro: Poa royleana, also known as Royle's Meadow-grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is native to the Himalayan region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Poa royleana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory problems.
